hero.headline: Senior React and Next.js engineer focused on performance, SEO and production delivery.
hero.subtitle: Hands-on with TypeScript, Node.js/NestJS and Flutter, with experience in dashboards, CMS, DataLayer/GTM and Core Web Vitals/Lighthouse optimization.

about.title: Experience and Impact
about.description: Professional with 8 years of front-end and full-stack experience, focused on high-performance digital products, technical SEO and reliable production delivery.
highlights: Stellantis landing pages delivered with scale, performance and SEO focus.
Full CMS migration from Hygraph to Sanity with zero downtime.
Full-stack experience across Flutter, Next.js, Node.js and NestJS.

bullets: Delivered an administrative module in Next.js with corporate authentication via AWS Cognito.
Integrated with Java/Spring Boot APIs for user, permission and role validation.
Structured AuthContext and admin flows to reduce production access issues.
Delivered web and mobile flows with Flutter and Next.js for auth, patients and appointments.
Evolved Node.js APIs and standardized payloads across teams.
Improved architecture to scale clinical and administrative modules.
Built landing pages for Jeep and Fiat brands using Next.js and TypeScript.
Delivered pages focused on Core Web Vitals, technical SEO and DataLayer/GTM.
Supported high-traffic production launches with CI/CD and monitoring.
Led a full Hygraph-to-Sanity CMS migration while preserving SEO and availability.
Built dashboards and admin modules focused on data clarity and performance.
Provided technical consulting on Next.js, Tailwind, performance and integrations.

techstack.title: Core Stack
techstack.description: Quick snapshot of the technologies and competencies most relevant for production projects.

items.title: Landing Page – Jeep Renegade
items.description: Creation of a highly optimized landing page for Jeep Renegade, prioritizing SEO, responsiveness, and tracking via Google Tag Manager. The project used reusable components and efficient media loading.

items.title: Landing Page – Jeep Compass
items.description: Development of the official Jeep Compass landing page, focusing on performance, SEO, and responsiveness. Features include image optimization, smart loading, accessible code, and integration with Google Tag Manager (DataLayer).

items.title: Landing Page – Fiat Titano
items.description: Development of the official landing page for the Fiat Titano model, focused on performance, responsiveness, and SEO. Features include lazy loading, image compression, semantic structure, and Google Tag Manager (DataLayer) integration for metrics analysis.

items.title: Sales and Financial Dashboard (Preview Unavailable)
items.description: Complete development of an admin panel for managing sales, withdrawals, and advances. The project includes 2FA authentication, advanced filters, dynamic charts, financial reports, and permission control. Modern and responsive interface focused on performance and user experience.

items.title: CMS for Peugeot Casacor Event
items.description: Led the development of a complete CMS for a Peugeot event. Built a robust API with authentication, protected routes, content management, and media uploads.

items.title: CMS Migration to Sanity
items.description: Full migration from Hygraph CMS to Sanity, including content restructuring and frontend refactoring in Next.js, focused on performance, scalability, and SEO.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Available for PJ contracts, based in Goiania-GO (remote/hybrid), with fast onboarding.
